mapper.insert: INSERT INTO master_board ( username, board_type, title, content ) VALUES ( #{userName}, 'REVIEW', #{title}, #{content} )

INSERT INTO review_board ( board_id, product_name, product_link, product_image, category1, category2 ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{productName}, #{productLink}, #{productImage}, #{category1}, #{category2} )
INSERT INTO board_file ( board_id, original_name, saved_name, file_path, file_type, file_size ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{originalName}, #{savedName}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.board_id, m.username, m.title, m.content, m.created_at, m.edited_at, m.view_cnt, m.like_cnt, m.reply_cnt, r.product_name, r.product_link, r.product_image, r.category1, r.category2 FROM master_board m INNER JOIN review_board r on m.board_id = r.board_id WHERE m.board_type = 'REVIEW' ORDER BY m.board_id desc;
